Compliance.description: Claims public liability insurance, staff background/reference checks, handles client employment compliance (UIF, leave, CCMA protection). No regulatory issues, complaints, or violations found in searches.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Positive testimonials on website (e.g. 10/10 ratings, sparkling clean); no HelloPeter, Google, or recent social reviews found. Limited independent feedback available.

Product Value.description: Flexible services matching industry pricing; value from compliance/insurance perks but lacks pricing transparency.

Innovation.description: Mentions online booking; no app, advanced tech, or unique innovations found. Basic digital presence.

Customer Support.description: Phone (065 920 8932), email (admin@allmaids.co.za), contact form, online booking. No data on response times or quality.

Accessibility & Security.description: Basic website access; online booking forms present but no explicit POPIA compliance, data security, or inclusivity mentions found. Assumed standard for small service business.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Quote-based (industry avg R200-800/day Gauteng); no fixed 2025/2026 rates published

socialSentiment.summary: No recent mentions on X/Twitter or complaints found; website testimonials positive but dated.
